
<style>
.msg { padding:10px; margin:10px 0; border-radius:8px; }
.msg.human { background: #2a2a2a; border: 1px solid #555; }
.msg.ai    { background: #262b36; border: 1px solid #445; }
.msg.tool  { background: #2e3330; border: 1px solid #474; }
summary { cursor:pointer; }
</style>
<details class="msg human">
<summary><strong>Human</strong></summary>

**Images**
<img alt="image" src="data:image/png;base64," />

**Content**
\[HUMAN\] Pick all objects that have a printed product label and place them on the floor

</details>

<details class="msg ai">
<summary><strong>AI</strong></summary>

**Content**
\[REASONING\_NOTE\] From my current position, I need to first get a better look at the objects to identify which ones have printed product labels. I'll use the Look tool to get a closer view of the objects.

**Tool calls**
- **Tool call:** `Look`

```json
{
  "x": 0.0,
  "y": 0.9,
  "z": -1.0
}
```


<details>
<summary>📊 <strong>Instrumentations</strong></summary>

</details>

</details>

**Content**

<details class="msg human">
<summary><strong>Human</strong></summary>

<img alt="image" src="data:image/png;base64," />

\[VISUAL\_PERCEPTION\]

<details class="msg ai">
<summary><strong>AI</strong></summary>

**Content**
\[REASONING\_NOTE\] From this view, I can see several objects, but I need to get an even closer look to clearly identify which ones have printed product labels. I'll move closer and look at the objects on the table.

**Tool calls**
- **Tool call:** `Walk`

```json
{
  "x": 0.0,
  "y": 0,
  "z": -1.5
}
```


<details>
